query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `whatsappLogs` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `candidateId` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `phone` varchar(30) NOT NULL,
  `candidateName` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL,
  `message` text NOT NULL,
  `templateType` varchar(50) DEFAULT 'custom',
  `messageId` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `status` enum('sent','delivered','read','failed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'sent',
  `errorMessage` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `sentBy` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `sentAt` bigint NOT NULL,
  `deliveredAt` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  `readAt` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `wba_candidate_idx` (`candidateId`),
  KEY `wba_status_idx` (`status`),
  KEY `wba_sent_at_idx` (`sentAt`)
);

  `deliveredAt` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  `readAt` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,

  KEY `wba_status_idx` (`status`),
  KEY `wba_sent_at_idx` (`sentAt`)
